events.title: Ilahi Sufi Qawwali — Ceremonial Ecstasy
events.description: An evening of candle-lit, rose-infused Qawwali poetry and ecstatically devotional Sufi music, presented by Ilahi Sufi Qawwali — the world's first all-women's Qawwali ensemble. Founded by Tahir Qawwal and Alexandra Amïe, Ilahi weaves the ancient South Asian devotional tradition of Qawwali — layered percussion, call-and-response poetry, and ecstatic singing — into a ceremony-grade gathering at The Yoga Barn. The ensemble has performed for millions globally and carries the blessing of the Qawwali lineage-holders. This is their Ubud return: expect the room to move between hushed stillness and collective devotional rapture. Qawwali is designed to dissolve the listener into a state that sits somewhere between prayer and ecstasy — not a concert, a ceremony.
events.short_description: World's first all-women's Qawwali ensemble brings a candle-lit, rose-infused ceremony of devotional Sufi music to The Yoga Barn. June 17.

events.title: Sunday Cacao Ceremony, Restorative Movement & Sacred Sound — Heart Space Bali
events.description: Heart Space Bali's Sunday evening ceremony is the quieter, more somatic counterpart to their Friday Cacao Ceremony. The three-part structure opens with ceremonial cacao — served as plant medicine, not a beverage — moves through restorative movement led from the floor, then grounds into live sacred sound healing to close. Founded in 2020 and rooted in the ceremonial traditions of Ubud, Heart Space integrates cacao, Balinese ritual, and sound as a single thread rather than a wellness class lineup. The Sunday format emphasises breath and nervous-system regulation more than its Friday sibling. The studio is small and intentional — Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1, a short walk from the central market. Doors at 7 PM.
events.short_description: Weekly Sunday ceremony at Heart Space Bali: cacao + restorative movement + live sacred sound healing. 7 PM, central Ubud.
events.venue_address: Jl. Nyuh Kuning No. 1, Ubud, Bali

events.title: Full Moon Fire Ceremony & Sound Healing — Pyramids of Chi
events.description: Each full moon, the Pyramids of Chi — a 1:16-scale replica of the Great Pyramid of Giza, set in the rice fields of Tegallalang — opens for a ceremony that has been running monthly without interruption. The evening begins around a sacred fire circle: participants call in the four directions and commit their intentions to the flames before moving inside the pyramid for an Ancient Sound Healing session, played by experienced practitioners across a spectrum of instruments. The structure itself is built with acoustic and energetic intention; the resonance inside the pyramid is distinctly physical. Closes with a three-course vegan dinner shared in community. This is the monthly community tier — not the daily tourist sessions. Sells out every full moon. Book in advance via events@pyramidsofchi.com as WhatsApp bookings are not accepted.
events.short_description: Monthly full moon fire ceremony + ancient sound healing inside a 1:16-scale pyramid, closing with vegan dinner. Sells out — book in advance.
events.venue_address: Jl. Kelebang Moding No. 22, Tegallalang, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: Contact events@pyramidsofchi.com to book (no WhatsApp). Sells out monthly.
